title: pilosella altaica
intro: Pilosella altaica, also known as the Alpine Mouse-ear, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella altaica are said to include relief from digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory ailments, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Pilosella altaica can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
